metadata.title: Turning a Close 2v1 Into a Clean Win with Smart Positioning in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Check out this intense 2v1 where calm moves and sharp shots make all the difference. How do you stay focused in clutch moments? Share your thoughts below!

Got a clutch like this? Drop your best plays in the comments!
